languages.text: Враг после рендждовой атаки должен пройти -25 WP тест при провале стреляет в своих. 1 раз в ход.

traits.locale_text: Враг после рендждовой атаки должен пройти -25 WP тест при провале стреляет в своих. 1 раз в ход.

languages.text: After an enemy makes a ranged attack against this creature, that enemy must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 penalty. If failed, the enemy immediately makes one more ranged attack against their ally. This effect can only be triggered once per {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
languages.original_text: Враг после рендждовой атаки должен пройти -25 WP тест при провале стреляет в своих. 1 раз в ход.

traits.locale_text: Any enemy that makes a ranged attack against the creature must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}. On a failed test, the enemy makes a ranged attack against one of their allies. This effect can be activated once per turn.

Any enemy that makes a ranged attack against this creature must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 penalty. On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, the enemy makes a ranged attack against one of their allies. This effect can only be activated once per {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

Any enemy that makes a ranged attack against this creature must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}. On a failed test, the enemy makes a ranged attack against one of their allies. This effect can only be activated once per turn.

Any enemy that makes a ranged attack against this creature must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 penalty. On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, the enemy makes a ranged attack against one of their allies. This effect can only be activated once per {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

languages.text: Совершив дальнобойную атаку по этому существу, враг должен выполнить проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воли{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −25. При провале он немедленно совершает еще одну дальнобойную атаку по одному из своих союзников. Эффект срабатывает только один раз за {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}.
languages.original_text: Any enemy that makes a ranged attack against this creature must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 penalty. On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, the enemy makes a ranged attack against one of their allies. This effect can only be activated once per {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Совершив дальнобойную атаку по этому существу, враг должен выполнить проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воли{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −25. При провале он немедленно совершает еще одну дальнобойную атаку по одному из своих союзников. Эффект срабатывает только один раз за {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}.

Совершив дальнобойную атаку по этому существу, враг должен выполнить проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воли{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −25. При провале он немедленно совершает еще одну дальнобойную атаку по одному из своих союзников. Эффект срабатывает только один раз за {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}.

languages.text: Tout ennemi portant une attaque à distance contre cette créature doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g} avec une pénalité de −25. En cas d'échec, l'ennemi exécute immédiatement une attaque à distance supplémentaire visant leur allié. Cet effet ne peut être déclenché qu'une fois par {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.
languages.original_text: After an enemy makes a ranged attack against this creature, that enemy must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 penalty. If failed, the enemy immediately makes one more ranged attack against their ally. This effect can only be triggered once per {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Tout ennemi portant une attaque à distance contre cette créature doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g} avec une pénalité de −25. En cas d'échec, l'ennemi exécute immédiatement une attaque à distance supplémentaire visant leur allié. Cet effet ne peut être déclenché qu'une fois par {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.

languages.text: Bir düşman, bu yaratığa menzilli bir saldırı yaptıktan sonra −25 ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Düşman, testten geçemezse o dost birime anında bir menzilli saldırı daha gerçekleştirir. Bu etki, her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turda{/g} yalnızca bir kez tetiklenebilir.
languages.original_text: After an enemy makes a ranged attack against this creature, that enemy must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 penalty. If failed, the enemy immediately makes one more ranged attack against their ally. This effect can only be triggered once per {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Bir düşman, bu yaratığa menzilli bir saldırı yaptıktan sonra −25 ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Düşman, testten geçemezse o dost birime anında bir menzilli saldırı daha gerçekleştirir. Bu etki, her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turda{/g} yalnızca bir kez tetiklenebilir.

languages.text: 任何远程攻击该生物的敌人必须通过一项有25减值的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}。若失败，则该敌人会立即额外远程攻击其一名盟友。此效果每{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}只能触发一次。
languages.original_text: After an enemy makes a ranged attack against this creature, that enemy must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 penalty. If failed, the enemy immediately makes one more ranged attack against their ally. This effect can only be triggered once per {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 任何远程攻击该生物的敌人必须通过一项有25减值的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}。若失败，则该敌人会立即额外远程攻击其一名盟友。此效果每{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}只能触发一次。

languages.text: Cuando un enemigo realice un ataque a distancia contra esta criatura, deberá superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g} con una penalización de −25. Si falla, el enemigo efectúa un segundo ataque a distancia dirigido contra uno de sus aliados. Este efecto solo puede activarse una vez por {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}.
languages.original_text: After an enemy makes a ranged attack against this creature, that enemy must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 penalty. If failed, the enemy immediately makes one more ranged attack against their ally. This effect can only be triggered once per {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Cuando un enemigo realice un ataque a distancia contra esta criatura, deberá superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g} con una penalización de −25. Si falla, el enemigo efectúa un segundo ataque a distancia dirigido contra uno de sus aliados. Este efecto solo puede activarse una vez por {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}.

languages.text: Ein Gegner, der einen Fernkampfangriff gegen diese Kreatur ausführt, muss eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g} mit einem Abzug von –25 bestehen. Misslingt die Probe, macht der Gegner sofort einen weiteren Fernkampfangriff gegen seinen Verbündeten. Dieser Effekt kann nur einmal pro {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} aktiviert werden.
languages.original_text: After an enemy makes a ranged attack against this creature, that enemy must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 penalty. If failed, the enemy immediately makes one more ranged attack against their ally. This effect can only be triggered once per {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Ein Gegner, der einen Fernkampfangriff gegen diese Kreatur ausführt, muss eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g} mit einem Abzug von –25 bestehen. Misslingt die Probe, macht der Gegner sofort einen weiteren Fernkampfangriff gegen seinen Verbündeten. Dieser Effekt kann nur einmal pro {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} aktiviert werden.

languages.text: 敵が遠距離攻撃をこのクリーチャーに対して行うと、その敵は−25のペナルティを付与された{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志力{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗力テスト{/g}に合格しなければなりません。失敗すると、その敵はすぐに味方に対してもう1度の遠距離攻撃を行います。この効果は1{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}に1度しか発動できません。
languages.original_text: After an enemy makes a ranged attack against this creature, that enemy must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −25 penalty. If failed, the enemy immediately makes one more ranged attack against their ally. This effect can only be triggered once per {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 敵が遠距離攻撃をこのクリーチャーに対して行うと、その敵は−25のペナルティを付与された{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志力{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗力テスト{/g}に合格しなければなりません。失敗すると、その敵はすぐに味方に対してもう1度の遠距離攻撃を行います。この効果は1{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}に1度しか発動できません。
